title: GeneVariantFetcher clinical counts (normalized long format)
description: One row per (gene, source-table row). Same variant can appear in multiple rows (different PMIDs / cohorts). Generated by scripts/build_gold_standard_from_varbrowser.py.

gene.description: Gene symbol. RYR2 is intentionally absent: Variant_Browser has no per-PMID clinical-paper table for it.

source_table.description: Fully qualified Azure SQL table name (with schema). The schema bracket matters: [SCN5A].[SCN5A_papers] is NOT in dbo.

source_row_ordinal.description: 1-based row index in the corresponding raw/<table>.csv (which is written in the same deterministic ORDER BY as the normalized output). The (gene, source_row_ordinal) pair is the guaranteed-unique audit key — needed because KCNQ1.Columna_1 (the natural PK) has 334 NULLs and 16 duplicate values.

source_row_id.description: Natural primary-key value from the source table. KCNH2: clinical_papers_id (unique). KCNQ1: Columna_1 (NOT unique — has NULLs and duplicates; use source_row_ordinal instead). SCN5A: id (unique).

source_type.description: How the row's variant counts were sourced. Derived per-gene: KCNH2 reads the PMID text column directly (digits → pubmed, '*Cohort' → cohort, 'Personal Communication' → personal_communication, NULL/'' → blank). KCNQ1 reads Lit_Y_N + Cohort_Y_N flags (Lit=1 → pubmed, Cohort=1 only → cohort, both 0 with PMID set → pubmed, else blank). SCN5A: any row with PMID set → pubmed (the table has zero null PMIDs as of 2026-05-14).

lit_flag.description: KCNQ1 only: value of Lit_Y_N. Null for KCNH2/SCN5A (no equivalent column).

cohort_flag.description: KCNQ1 only: value of Cohort_Y_N. Null for KCNH2/SCN5A.

pmid.description: PubMed ID as a string of digits. Null if source_type != 'pubmed'.

cohort_label.description: Free-text cohort name when source_type='cohort' (e.g. 'Japan Cohort'). Null otherwise.

year.description: Publication / cohort year. Null when source is blank or year is unparseable.

variant_raw.description: Variant string verbatim from the source table's Variant/var column (trimmed).

variant_normalized.description: HGVS-style normalized name from utils.variant_normalizer.normalize_variant. Falls back to variant_raw if normalization fails.

affected_lqt.description: LQT-affected carriers. KCNH2: LQT column. KCNQ1: LQT1 column. Null for SCN5A (BrS+LQT3 are tracked separately).

affected_lqt3.description: SCN5A LQT3-affected carriers. Null for KCNH2/KCNQ1.

affected_brs1.description: SCN5A BrS1-affected carriers. Null for KCNH2/KCNQ1.

affected_sqts.description: KCNQ1 short-QT-affected carriers. Null for KCNH2/SCN5A.

affected_other.description: SCN5A 'Other' affected count. Null for KCNH2/KCNQ1.

scd.description: Sudden cardiac death count. Stored as text in the source DB; null if not parseable.

sids.description: KCNQ1 only: SIDS count. Stored as text; null if not parseable.

unaffected.description: Asymptomatic / unaffected carriers. KCNH2: AMB+UNA. KCNQ1: Asymptomatic. SCN5A: Normal.

ambiguous.description: Ambiguous-phenotype carriers. KCNH2: AMB. KCNQ1: Ambiguous_Phenotype_Hets. Null for SCN5A.

unknown_phenotype.description: Unknown-phenotype carriers. KCNH2: UNK. KCNQ1: Unknown_Phenotype_Hets. Null for SCN5A.

homozygous.description: Homozygous carriers. KCNH2: HOM. KCNQ1: Homozygous_Carriers. Null for SCN5A.

compound_hets.description: KCNQ1 only: Heterozygous_JLNS. Null for KCNH2/SCN5A.

het_count.description: KCNQ1 only: total HET column. Null for KCNH2/SCN5A.

total_stated.description: Total carrier count as stated by the source row. KCNH2 has no stated total — null. KCNQ1 has no single 'total' column — null. SCN5A: Total column.

carriers_total_computed.description: Sum of all affected_*, unaffected, ambiguous, unknown_phenotype, homozygous, compound_hets, het_count columns (counting each non-null component once). This is the value used for GVF recall scoring.

affected_total.description: Sum of all affected_* columns (the disease-affected subset). Lets GVF distinguish 'patient with phenotype' from 'unaffected carrier'.

count_balance_delta.description: total_stated - carriers_total_computed. Null when total_stated is null. Non-zero entries are emitted to qc/count_balance_flags.csv.

other_diag.description: Free-text 'other diagnosis' / 'Other_Disease' column passed through verbatim.

quality_flags.description: Pipe-delimited tags emitted by the exporter. Empty string when clean. Vocabulary: 'parse_int_failure:<col>' (value couldn't coerce to int), 'unparseable_pmid', 'variant_normalize_fallback', 'cohort_label_in_pmid_field', 'crosswalk_unmatched', 'duplicate_pair'.

crosswalk_match_method.description: How the row's variant_normalized was matched to the gene-specific browser/aggregate variant table. Null means no crosswalk was attempted (e.g. RYR2).

browser_variant.description: The matched variant name from the browser table (KCNH2: all_vars_annotated.var with isoform='A'; KCNQ1: KCNQ1_browser_main.var; SCN5A: SCN5A_dataset.var). Null if unmatched.
